title: jurinea gabrieliae
intro: Jurinea gabrieliae, also known as Huang qin, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly found in China and other parts of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Jurinea gabrieliae include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia, and supporting the immune system. In traditional Chinese medicine, Jurinea gabrieliae is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs to create tonics and infusions.
